## Summary

Describe the change clearly and directly.

## Why

Explain the user or project problem this PR solves.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Example/template
- [ ] CI/release
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Regenerated examples if output behavior changed
- [ ] Updated docs if YAML/config/CLI behavior changed

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
